item.name: Lau Lau
item.description:
This catfish species can often be found scouring the lakebed for its next meal.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Preferring to trawl the silty sediment than roam in open water, this species of catfish can grow to a length of almost three yalms. As it matures, this fish must search ever longer to find a resting nook large enough to accommodate its bulk.
